predictedBugs: Snooze file written concurrently (two commands at once) could cause last-write-wins data loss — acceptable for single-user CLI
Content threshold of >50 chars may trigger false positives for very concise but valid artifacts (edge case for tiny docs)
Warning function throws silently caught by executePreCommandHooks — errors logged but user not informed (intentional, warnings are advisory)
edgeCases: Corrupted snooze JSON file handled gracefully — loadSnoozeState catches JSON parse errors, returns empty state
Feature directory missing handled gracefully — safeReadFile returns null, warnings report missing artifacts
Unicode/special characters in feature IDs as JSON keys — JSON.stringify/parse handles correctly
Warning for non-relevant command names filtered out early (returns null), no unnecessary I/O for unrelated commands
